Resource Profile: AS Practitioner Profile

Official URL: http://interop.esante.gouv.fr/ig/fhir/annuaire-donnee-publique/StructureDefinition/as-practitioner Version: 0.0.3
Active as of 2023-04-20 Computable Name: ASPractitionerProfile

Profil créé à partir de la ressource Practitioner dans le contexte de l’Annuaire Santé pour décrire les données d’identification pérennes d’une personne physique, qui travaille en tant que professionnel (professionnel enregistré dans RPPS ou ADELI), personnel autorisé ou personnel d’établissement, dans les domaines sanitaire, médico-social et social.

Usage:

  • This Resource Profile is not used by any profiles in this Implementation Guide

Formal Views of Profile Content

Description of Profiles, Differentials, Snapshots and how the different presentations work.

  • Text Summary
  • Differential Table
  • Snapshot Table
  • Snapshot Table (Must Support)
  • All

This structure is derived from Practitioner

Summary

Mandatory: 0 element (19 nested mandatory elements)
Must-Support: 44 elements
Fixed Value: 16 elements

Structures

This structure refers to these other structures:

  • FrHumanName (http://interopsante.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/FrHumanName)
  • FrContactPoint (http://interopsante.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/FrContactPoint)
  • As Address Extended Profile (http://interop.esante.gouv.fr/ig/fhir/annuaire-donnee-publique/StructureDefinition/as-address-extended)
  • CodeableConceptTimed (https://apifhir.annuaire.sante.fr/ws-sync/exposed/structuredefinition/codeableConcept-timed)

Extensions

This structure refers to these extensions:

  • https://apifhir.annuaire.sante.fr/ws-sync/exposed/structuredefinition/practitioner-nationality
  • https://apifhir.annuaire.sante.fr/ws-sync/exposed/structuredefinition/practitioner-authorization
  • https://apifhir.annuaire.sante.fr/ws-sync/exposed/structuredefinition/practitioner-birthPlace
  • https://apifhir.annuaire.sante.fr/ws-sync/exposed/structuredefinition/practitioner-deceasedDateTime
  • http://interop.esante.gouv.fr/ig/fhir/annuaire-donnee-publique/StructureDefinition/as-ext-mailbox-mss

Slices

This structure defines the following Slices:

  • The element Practitioner.name.extension.value[x] is sliced based on the value of type:$this (Closed)
  • The element Practitioner.qualification.code.coding is sliced based on the value of value:system

This structure is derived from Practitioner

NameFlagsCard.TypeDescription & Constraints
​ Practitioner 0..*PractitionerA person with a formal responsibility in the provisioning of healthcare or related services
​ meta
​ lastUpdated 1..1instantWhen the resource version last changed
​ nationality S0..1(Complex)Nationalité du professionnel
URL: https://apifhir.annuaire.sante.fr/ws-sync/exposed/structuredefinition/practitioner-nationality
​ authorization 0..*(Complex)AutorisationExercice
URL: https://apifhir.annuaire.sante.fr/ws-sync/exposed/structuredefinition/practitioner-authorization
​ birthPlace S0..1FrAddressExtendedlieuNaissance
URL: https://apifhir.annuaire.sante.fr/ws-sync/exposed/structuredefinition/practitioner-birthPlace
​ deceasedDateTime 0..*dateTimedateDeces
URL: https://apifhir.annuaire.sante.fr/ws-sync/exposed/structuredefinition/practitioner-deceasedDateTime
​ mailboxMSS 0..*(Complex)BoiteLettreMSS
URL: http://interop.esante.gouv.fr/ig/fhir/annuaire-donnee-publique/StructureDefinition/as-ext-mailbox-mss
​ identifier 0..*IdentifierUne instance par identifiant (RPPS, ADELI, idNat_PS…)
​ type 1..1CodeableConceptDescription of identifier
Binding: fr-practioner-identifier-type (extensible): ValueSet défini par Interop’Santé « fr-practioner-identifier-type

​ system 1..1urile system de l'identifiant dépend de la source d'où provient l'identifiant
​ value 1..1stringla valeur de l'identifiant du PS
​ name 0..*FrHumanNameUne instance pour le nom d’usage et une instance pour le nom issu de l’état-civil
​ id S0..1stringUnique id for inter-element referencing
​ extension:assemblyOrder S0..1AssemblyOrderPreferred display order of name parts
​ value[x] 1..1Value of extension
Slice: Unordered, Closed by type:$this
​ use S0..1codeusual | official | temp | nickname | anonymous | old | maiden
​ text S0..1stringText representation of the full name
​ family S0..1stringFamily name (often called 'Surname')
​ given S0..*stringGiven names (not always 'first'). Includes middle names
​ prefix 0..1stringParts that come before the name
Binding: https://mos.esante.gouv.fr/NOS/JDV_J78-Civilite-RASS/FHIR/JDV-J78-Civilite-RASS (required): Civilités des personnes physiques du RASS

​ suffix S0..*stringjeu de valeurs pour spécifier le titre de la personne
​ period S0..1PeriodTime period when name was/is in use
​ telecom S0..*FrContactPointDetails of a Technology mediated contact point (phone, fax, email, etc.)
​ system 1..1codephone | fax | email | pager | url | sms | other
​ use 0..1codehome | work | temp | old | mobile - purpose of this contact point
​ address S0..*AsAddressExtendedProfileAn address expressed using postal conventions (as opposed to GPS or other location definition formats)
​ gender S0..1codemale | female | other | unknown
​ birthDate S0..1dateThe date on which the practitioner was born
​ photo S0..*AttachmentImage of the person
​ qualification 0..*BackboneElementCertification, licenses, or training pertaining to the provision of care
​ id S0..1stringUnique id for inter-element referencing
​ identifier S0..*IdentifierNuméro de diplôme
​ code
​ id S0..1stringUnique id for inter-element referencing
​ Slices for coding 0..*CodingCode defined by a terminology system
Slice: Unordered, Open by value:system
​ coding:degreeType S0..1CodingCode defined by a terminology system
Binding: https://mos.esante.gouv.fr/NOS/JDV_J81-TypeDiplome-RASS/FHIR/JDV-J81-TypeDiplome-RASS (required): Types de diplôme du RASS

​ system 1..1uriIdentity of the terminology system
Fixed Value: https://mos.esante.gouv.fr/NOS/TRE_R14-TypeDiplome/FHIR/TRE-R14-TypeDiplome

Binding: https://mos.esante.gouv.fr/NOS/JDV_J105-EnsembleDiplome-RASS/FHIR/JDV-J105-EnsembleDiplome-RASS (required): Ensemble des diplômes et qualifications du RASS

​ text S0..1stringPlain text representation of the concept
​ period S0..1PeriodPeriod during which the qualification is valid
​ issuer S0..1Reference(Organization)Organization that regulates and issues the qualification
​ reference S0..1stringLiteral reference, Relative, internal or absolute URL
​ type S0..1uriType the reference refers to (e.g. "Patient")
​ identifier 0..1IdentifierCode du lieu d'obtention du diplôme
​ use S0..1codeusual | official | temp | secondary | old (If known)
​ type S0..1CodeableConceptDescription of identifier
​ system 0..1uriThe namespace for the identifier value
Fixed Value: urn:oid:1.2.250.1.213.1.6.4.1
​ period S0..1PeriodTime period when id is/was valid for use
​ assigner S0..1Reference(Organization)Organization that issued id (may be just text)
​ display S0..1stringText alternative for the resource
​ communication S0..*CodeableConceptTimedConcept - reference to a terminology or just text

Documentation for this format
NameFlagsCard.TypeDescription & Constraints
Practitioner 0..*PractitionerA person with a formal responsibility in the provisioning of healthcare or related services
id Σ0..1idLogical id of this artifact
meta ΣN0..1MetaMetadata about the resource
id 0..1stringUnique id for inter-element referencing
extension N0..*ExtensionAdditional content defined by implementations
Slice: Unordered, Open by value:url
versionId ΣN0..1idVersion specific identifier
lastUpdated Σ1..1instantWhen the resource version last changed
source ΣN0..1uriIdentifies where the resource comes from
profile ΣN0..*canonical(StructureDefinition)Profiles this resource claims to conform to
security ΣN0..*CodingSecurity Labels applied to this resource
Binding: All Security Labels (extensible): Security Labels from the Healthcare Privacy and Security Classification System.


tag ΣN0..*CodingTags applied to this resource
Binding: CommonTags (example): Codes that represent various types of tags, commonly workflow-related; e.g. "Needs review by Dr. Jones".


implicitRules ?!ΣN0..1uriA set of rules under which this content was created
language N0..1codeLanguage of the resource content
Binding: CommonLanguages (preferred): A human language.

AllLanguagesMax Binding
text N0..1NarrativeText summary of the resource, for human interpretation

URL: https://apifhir.annuaire.sante.fr/ws-sync/exposed/structuredefinition/practitioner-nationality

URL: https://apifhir.annuaire.sante.fr/ws-sync/exposed/structuredefinition/practitioner-authorization

identifier Σ0..*IdentifierUne instance par identifiant (RPPS, ADELI, idNat_PS…)
id 0..1stringUnique id for inter-element referencing
extension N0..*ExtensionAdditional content defined by implementations
Slice: Unordered, Open by value:url
use ?!ΣN0..1codeusual | official | temp | secondary | old (If known)
Binding: IdentifierUse (required): Identifies the purpose for this identifier, if known .

type Σ1..1CodeableConceptDescription of identifier
Binding: fr-practioner-identifier-type (extensible): ValueSet défini par Interop’Santé « fr-practioner-identifier-type

system Σ1..1urile system de l'identifiant dépend de la source d'où provient l'identifiant
Example General: http://www.acme.com/identifiers/patient
value Σ1..1stringla valeur de l'identifiant du PS
Example General: 123456
period ΣCN0..1PeriodTime period when id is/was valid for use
assigner ΣCN0..1Reference(Organization)Organization that issued id (may be just text)
active ΣN0..1booleanWhether this practitioner's record is in active use
name 0..*FrHumanNameUne instance pour le nom d’usage et une instance pour le nom issu de l’état-civil
id S0..1stringUnique id for inter-element referencing
Slices for extension N0..*ExtensionAdditional content defined by implementations
Slice: Unordered, Open by value:url
assemblyOrder S0..1codePreferred display order of name parts
URL: http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/humanname-assembly-order
Binding: HumanNameAssemblyOrder (required): A code that represents the preferred display order of the components of a human name.


id 0..1stringUnique id for inter-element referencing
extension N0..*ExtensionAdditional content defined by implementations
Slice: Unordered, Open by value:url
url 1..1uri"http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/humanname-assembly-order"
value[x] 1..1Value of extension
Slice: Unordered, Closed by type:$this
Binding: HumanNameAssemblyOrder (required): A code that represents the preferred display order of the components of a human name.

use ?!SΣ0..1codeusual | official | temp | nickname | anonymous | old | maiden
Binding: NameUse (required): The use of a human name.

text SΣ0..1stringText representation of the full name
family SΣ0..1stringFamily name (often called 'Surname')
given SΣ0..*stringGiven names (not always 'first'). Includes middle names
This repeating element order: Given Names appear in the correct order for presenting the name
prefix Σ0..1stringParts that come before the name
Binding: https://mos.esante.gouv.fr/NOS/JDV_J78-Civilite-RASS/FHIR/JDV-J78-Civilite-RASS (required): Civilités des personnes physiques du RASS


This repeating element order: Prefixes appear in the correct order for presenting the name
suffix SΣ0..*stringjeu de valeurs pour spécifier le titre de la personne
Binding: https://mos.esante.gouv.fr/NOS/JDV_J79-CiviliteExercice-RASS/FHIR/JDV-J79-CiviliteExercice-RASS (extensible): Civilités d'exercice d'un professionnel du RASS


This repeating element order: Suffixes appear in the correct order for presenting the name
period SΣC0..1PeriodTime period when name was/is in use
telecom SC0..*FrContactPointDetails of a Technology mediated contact point (phone, fax, email, etc.)
id 0..1stringUnique id for inter-element referencing

Slice: Unordered, Open by value:url

Binding: fr-email-type (extensible)
system ΣC1..1codephone | fax | email | pager | url | sms | other
Binding: ContactPointSystem (required): Telecommunications form for contact point.

value ΣN1..1stringThe actual contact point details
use ?!Σ0..1codehome | work | temp | old | mobile - purpose of this contact point
Binding: ContactPointUse (required): Use of contact point.

rank ΣN0..1positiveIntSpecify preferred order of use (1 = highest)
period ΣCN0..1PeriodTime period when the contact point was/is in use
address S0..*AsAddressExtendedProfileAn address expressed using postal conventions (as opposed to GPS or other location definition formats)
gender SΣ0..1codemale | female | other | unknown
Binding: AdministrativeGender (required): The gender of a person used for administrative purposes.

photo SC0..*AttachmentImage of the person

identifier S0..*IdentifierNuméro de diplôme
code N1..1CodeableConceptCoded representation of the qualification

text SΣ0..1stringPlain text representation of the concept
period SC0..1PeriodPeriod during which the qualification is valid

id 0..1stringUnique id for inter-element referencing
extension N0..*ExtensionAdditional content defined by implementations
Slice: Unordered, Open by value:url
reference SΣC0..1stringLiteral reference, Relative, internal or absolute URL
type SΣ0..1uriType the reference refers to (e.g. "Patient")
Binding: ResourceType (extensible): Aa resource (or, for logical models, the URI of the logical model).

identifier Σ0..1IdentifierCode du lieu d'obtention du diplôme
id 0..1stringUnique id for inter-element referencing
extension N0..*ExtensionAdditional content defined by implementations
Slice: Unordered, Open by value:url
use ?!SΣ0..1codeusual | official | temp | secondary | old (If known)
Binding: IdentifierUse (required): Identifies the purpose for this identifier, if known .

type SΣ0..1CodeableConceptDescription of identifier
Binding: Identifier Type Codes (extensible): A coded type for an identifier that can be used to determine which identifier to use for a specific purpose.

system Σ0..1uriThe namespace for the identifier value
Fixed Value: urn:oid:1.2.250.1.213.1.6.4.1
value ΣN0..1stringThe value that is unique
Example General: 123456
period SΣC0..1PeriodTime period when id is/was valid for use
assigner SΣC0..1Reference(Organization)Organization that issued id (may be just text)
display SΣ0..1stringText alternative for the resource
communication S0..*CodeableConceptTimedConcept - reference to a terminology or just text
Binding: CommonLanguages (preferred): A human language.

Additional BindingsPurpose
AllLanguagesMax Binding


Documentation for this format
NameFlagsCard.TypeDescription & Constraints
​ Practitioner 0..*PractitionerA person with a formal responsibility in the provisioning of healthcare or related services
​ nationality 0..1(Complex)Nationalité du professionnel
URL: https://apifhir.annuaire.sante.fr/ws-sync/exposed/structuredefinition/practitioner-nationality
​ birthPlace 0..1FrAddressExtendedlieuNaissance
URL: https://apifhir.annuaire.sante.fr/ws-sync/exposed/structuredefinition/practitioner-birthPlace
​ name 0..*FrHumanNameUne instance pour le nom d’usage et une instance pour le nom issu de l’état-civil
​ id 0..1stringUnique id for inter-element referencing
​ assemblyOrder 0..1codePreferred display order of name parts
URL: http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/humanname-assembly-order
Binding: HumanNameAssemblyOrder (required): A code that represents the preferred display order of the components of a human name.


​ use ?!Σ0..1codeusual | official | temp | nickname | anonymous | old | maiden
Binding: NameUse (required): The use of a human name.

​ text Σ0..1stringText representation of the full name
​ family Σ0..1stringFamily name (often called 'Surname')
​ given Σ0..*stringGiven names (not always 'first'). Includes middle names
This repeating element order: Given Names appear in the correct order for presenting the name
​ suffix Σ0..*stringjeu de valeurs pour spécifier le titre de la personne
Binding: https://mos.esante.gouv.fr/NOS/JDV_J79-CiviliteExercice-RASS/FHIR/JDV-J79-CiviliteExercice-RASS (extensible): Civilités d'exercice d'un professionnel du RASS


This repeating element order: Suffixes appear in the correct order for presenting the name
​ period ΣC0..1PeriodTime period when name was/is in use
​ telecom C0..*FrContactPointDetails of a Technology mediated contact point (phone, fax, email, etc.)
​ address 0..*AsAddressExtendedProfileAn address expressed using postal conventions (as opposed to GPS or other location definition formats)
​ gender Σ0..1codemale | female | other | unknown
Binding: AdministrativeGender (required): The gender of a person used for administrative purposes.

​ birthDate Σ0..1dateThe date on which the practitioner was born
​ photo C0..*AttachmentImage of the person
​ qualification 0..*BackboneElementCertification, licenses, or training pertaining to the provision of care
​ id 0..1stringUnique id for inter-element referencing
​ identifier 0..*IdentifierNuméro de diplôme
​ code N1..1CodeableConceptCoded representation of the qualification
​ id 0..1stringUnique id for inter-element referencing
​ coding:degreeType Σ0..1CodingCode defined by a terminology system
Binding: https://mos.esante.gouv.fr/NOS/JDV_J81-TypeDiplome-RASS/FHIR/JDV-J81-TypeDiplome-RASS (required): Types de diplôme du RASS


​ coding:degreeR48 Σ0..1CodingCode defined by a terminology system
Binding: https://mos.esante.gouv.fr/NOS/JDV_J105-EnsembleDiplome-RASS/FHIR/JDV-J105-EnsembleDiplome-RASS (required): Ensemble des diplômes et qualifications du RASS

​ coding:degreeR50 Σ0..1CodingCode defined by a terminology system
Binding: https://mos.esante.gouv.fr/NOS/JDV_J105-EnsembleDiplome-RASS/FHIR/JDV-J105-EnsembleDiplome-RASS (required): Ensemble des diplômes et qualifications du RASS

Binding: https://mos.esante.gouv.fr/NOS/JDV_J105-EnsembleDiplome-RASS/FHIR/JDV-J105-EnsembleDiplome-RASS (required): Ensemble des diplômes et qualifications du RASS

​ coding:degreeR226 Σ0..1CodingCode defined by a terminology system

​ text Σ0..1stringPlain text representation of the concept
​ period C0..1PeriodPeriod during which the qualification is valid
​ issuer C0..1Reference(Organization)Organization that regulates and issues the qualification
​ reference ΣC0..1stringLiteral reference, Relative, internal or absolute URL
​ type Σ0..1uriType the reference refers to (e.g. "Patient")
Binding: ResourceType (extensible): Aa resource (or, for logical models, the URI of the logical model).

​ identifier Σ0..1IdentifierCode du lieu d'obtention du diplôme
​ use ?!Σ0..1codeusual | official | temp | secondary | old (If known)
Binding: IdentifierUse (required): Identifies the purpose for this identifier, if known .

​ type Σ0..1CodeableConceptDescription of identifier
Binding: Identifier Type Codes (extensible): A coded type for an identifier that can be used to determine which identifier to use for a specific purpose.

​ period ΣC0..1PeriodTime period when id is/was valid for use
​ assigner ΣC0..1Reference(Organization)Organization that issued id (may be just text)
​ display Σ0..1stringText alternative for the resource
​ communication 0..*CodeableConceptTimedConcept - reference to a terminology or just text
Binding: CommonLanguages (preferred): A human language.

Additional BindingsPurpose
AllLanguagesMax Binding


Documentation for this format

This structure is derived from Practitioner

Summary

Mandatory: 0 element (19 nested mandatory elements)
Must-Support: 44 elements
Fixed Value: 16 elements

Structures

This structure refers to these other structures:

  • FrHumanName (http://interopsante.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/FrHumanName)
  • FrContactPoint (http://interopsante.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/FrContactPoint)
  • As Address Extended Profile (http://interop.esante.gouv.fr/ig/fhir/annuaire-donnee-publique/StructureDefinition/as-address-extended)
  • CodeableConceptTimed (https://apifhir.annuaire.sante.fr/ws-sync/exposed/structuredefinition/codeableConcept-timed)

Extensions

This structure refers to these extensions:

  • https://apifhir.annuaire.sante.fr/ws-sync/exposed/structuredefinition/practitioner-nationality
  • https://apifhir.annuaire.sante.fr/ws-sync/exposed/structuredefinition/practitioner-authorization
  • https://apifhir.annuaire.sante.fr/ws-sync/exposed/structuredefinition/practitioner-birthPlace
  • https://apifhir.annuaire.sante.fr/ws-sync/exposed/structuredefinition/practitioner-deceasedDateTime
  • http://interop.esante.gouv.fr/ig/fhir/annuaire-donnee-publique/StructureDefinition/as-ext-mailbox-mss

Slices

This structure defines the following Slices:

  • The element Practitioner.name.extension.value[x] is sliced based on the value of type:$this (Closed)
  • The element Practitioner.qualification.code.coding is sliced based on the value of value:system

Differential View

This structure is derived from Practitioner

NameFlagsCard.TypeDescription & Constraints
​ Practitioner 0..*PractitionerA person with a formal responsibility in the provisioning of healthcare or related services
​ meta

​ nationality S0..1(Complex)Nationalité du professionnel
URL: https://apifhir.annuaire.sante.fr/ws-sync/exposed/structuredefinition/practitioner-nationality

URL: http://interop.esante.gouv.fr/ig/fhir/annuaire-donnee-publique/StructureDefinition/as-ext-mailbox-mss
​ identifier 0..*IdentifierUne instance par identifiant (RPPS, ADELI, idNat_PS…)
​ type 1..1CodeableConceptDescription of identifier
Binding: fr-practioner-identifier-type (extensible): ValueSet défini par Interop’Santé « fr-practioner-identifier-type

​ system 1..1urile system de l'identifiant dépend de la source d'où provient l'identifiant
​ value 1..1stringla valeur de l'identifiant du PS
​ name 0..*FrHumanNameUne instance pour le nom d’usage et une instance pour le nom issu de l’état-civil
​ id S0..1stringUnique id for inter-element referencing
​ extension:assemblyOrder S0..1AssemblyOrderPreferred display order of name parts
​ value[x] 1..1Value of extension
Slice: Unordered, Closed by type:$this
​ use S0..1codeusual | official | temp | nickname | anonymous | old | maiden
​ text S0..1stringText representation of the full name
​ family S0..1stringFamily name (often called 'Surname')
​ given S0..*stringGiven names (not always 'first'). Includes middle names
​ prefix 0..1stringParts that come before the name
Binding: https://mos.esante.gouv.fr/NOS/JDV_J78-Civilite-RASS/FHIR/JDV-J78-Civilite-RASS (required): Civilités des personnes physiques du RASS

​ text S0..1stringPlain text representation of the concept
​ period S0..1PeriodPeriod during which the qualification is valid
​ issuer S0..1Reference(Organization)Organization that regulates and issues the qualification
​ reference S0..1stringLiteral reference, Relative, internal or absolute URL
​ type S0..1uriType the reference refers to (e.g. "Patient")
​ identifier 0..1IdentifierCode du lieu d'obtention du diplôme
​ use S0..1codeusual | official | temp | secondary | old (If known)
​ type S0..1CodeableConceptDescription of identifier
​ system 0..1uriThe namespace for the identifier value
Fixed Value: urn:oid:1.2.250.1.213.1.6.4.1
​ period S0..1PeriodTime period when id is/was valid for use
​ assigner S0..1Reference(Organization)Organization that issued id (may be just text)
​ display S0..1stringText alternative for the resource
​ communication S0..*CodeableConceptTimedConcept - reference to a terminology or just text

Documentation for this format

Snapshot View

NameFlagsCard.TypeDescription & Constraints
Practitioner 0..*PractitionerA person with a formal responsibility in the provisioning of healthcare or related services
id Σ0..1idLogical id of this artifact
meta ΣN0..1MetaMetadata about the resource
id 0..1stringUnique id for inter-element referencing
extension N0..*ExtensionAdditional content defined by implementations
Slice: Unordered, Open by value:url
versionId ΣN0..1idVersion specific identifier
lastUpdated Σ1..1instantWhen the resource version last changed
source ΣN0..1uriIdentifies where the resource comes from
profile ΣN0..*canonical(StructureDefinition)Profiles this resource claims to conform to
security ΣN0..*CodingSecurity Labels applied to this resource
Binding: All Security Labels (extensible): Security Labels from the Healthcare Privacy and Security Classification System.


tag ΣN0..*CodingTags applied to this resource
Binding: CommonTags (example): Codes that represent various types of tags, commonly workflow-related; e.g. "Needs review by Dr. Jones".


implicitRules ?!ΣN0..1uriA set of rules under which this content was created
language N0..1codeLanguage of the resource content
Binding: CommonLanguages (preferred): A human language.

Additional BindingsPurpose
AllLanguagesMax Binding
text N0..1NarrativeText summary of the resource, for human interpretation
contained 0..*ResourceContained, inline Resources
Slices for extension N0..*ExtensionAdditional content defined by implementations
Slice: Unordered, Open by value:url
nationality S0..1(Complex)Nationalité du professionnel
URL: https://apifhir.annuaire.sante.fr/ws-sync/exposed/structuredefinition/practitioner-nationality
authorization 0..*(Complex)AutorisationExercice
URL: https://apifhir.annuaire.sante.fr/ws-sync/exposed/structuredefinition/practitioner-authorization
birthPlace S0..1FrAddressExtendedlieuNaissance
URL: https://apifhir.annuaire.sante.fr/ws-sync/exposed/structuredefinition/practitioner-birthPlace
deceasedDateTime 0..*dateTimedateDeces
URL: https://apifhir.annuaire.sante.fr/ws-sync/exposed/structuredefinition/practitioner-deceasedDateTime
mailboxMSS 0..*(Complex)BoiteLettreMSS
URL: http://interop.esante.gouv.fr/ig/fhir/annuaire-donnee-publique/StructureDefinition/as-ext-mailbox-mss
modifierExtension ?!N0..*ExtensionExtensions that cannot be ignored
Slice: Unordered, Open by value:url
identifier Σ0..*IdentifierUne instance par identifiant (RPPS, ADELI, idNat_PS…)
id 0..1stringUnique id for inter-element referencing
extension N0..*ExtensionAdditional content defined by implementations
Slice: Unordered, Open by value:url
use ?!ΣN0..1codeusual | official | temp | secondary | old (If known)
Binding: IdentifierUse (required): Identifies the purpose for this identifier, if known .

type Σ1..1CodeableConceptDescription of identifier
Binding: fr-practioner-identifier-type (extensible): ValueSet défini par Interop’Santé « fr-practioner-identifier-type

system Σ1..1urile system de l'identifiant dépend de la source d'où provient l'identifiant
Example General: http://www.acme.com/identifiers/patient
value Σ1..1stringla valeur de l'identifiant du PS
Example General: 123456
period ΣCN0..1PeriodTime period when id is/was valid for use
assigner ΣCN0..1Reference(Organization)Organization that issued id (may be just text)
active ΣN0..1booleanWhether this practitioner's record is in active use
name 0..*FrHumanNameUne instance pour le nom d’usage et une instance pour le nom issu de l’état-civil
id S0..1stringUnique id for inter-element referencing
Slices for extension N0..*ExtensionAdditional content defined by implementations
Slice: Unordered, Open by value:url
assemblyOrder S0..1codePreferred display order of name parts
URL: http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/humanname-assembly-order
Binding: HumanNameAssemblyOrder (required): A code that represents the preferred display order of the components of a human name.


id 0..1stringUnique id for inter-element referencing
extension N0..*ExtensionAdditional content defined by implementations
Slice: Unordered, Open by value:url
url 1..1uri"http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/humanname-assembly-order"
value[x] 1..1Value of extension
Slice: Unordered, Closed by type:$this
Binding: HumanNameAssemblyOrder (required): A code that represents the preferred display order of the components of a human name.

use ?!SΣ0..1codeusual | official | temp | nickname | anonymous | old | maiden
Binding: NameUse (required): The use of a human name.

text SΣ0..1stringText representation of the full name
family SΣ0..1stringFamily name (often called 'Surname')
given SΣ0..*stringGiven names (not always 'first'). Includes middle names
This repeating element order: Given Names appear in the correct order for presenting the name
prefix Σ0..1stringParts that come before the name
Binding: https://mos.esante.gouv.fr/NOS/JDV_J78-Civilite-RASS/FHIR/JDV-J78-Civilite-RASS (required): Civilités des personnes physiques du RASS


This repeating element order: Prefixes appear in the correct order for presenting the name
suffix SΣ0..*stringjeu de valeurs pour spécifier le titre de la personne
Binding: https://mos.esante.gouv.fr/NOS/JDV_J79-CiviliteExercice-RASS/FHIR/JDV-J79-CiviliteExercice-RASS (extensible): Civilités d'exercice d'un professionnel du RASS


This repeating element order: Suffixes appear in the correct order for presenting the name
period SΣC0..1PeriodTime period when name was/is in use
telecom SC0..*FrContactPointDetails of a Technology mediated contact point (phone, fax, email, etc.)
id 0..1stringUnique id for inter-element referencing
Slices for extension N0..*ExtensionAdditional content defined by implementations
Slice: Unordered, Open by value:url
emailType N0..1CodingType of email | type de messagerie électronique
URL: http://interopsante.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/FrContactPointEmailType
Binding: fr-email-type (extensible)
system ΣC1..1codephone | fax | email | pager | url | sms | other
Binding: ContactPointSystem (required): Telecommunications form for contact point.

value ΣN1..1stringThe actual contact point details
use ?!Σ0..1codehome | work | temp | old | mobile - purpose of this contact point
Binding: ContactPointUse (required): Use of contact point.

rank ΣN0..1positiveIntSpecify preferred order of use (1 = highest)
period ΣCN0..1PeriodTime period when the contact point was/is in use
address S0..*AsAddressExtendedProfileAn address expressed using postal conventions (as opposed to GPS or other location definition formats)
gender SΣ0..1codemale | female | other | unknown
Binding: AdministrativeGender (required): The gender of a person used for administrative purposes.

birthDate SΣ0..1dateThe date on which the practitioner was born
photo SC0..*AttachmentImage of the person
qualification 0..*BackboneElementCertification, licenses, or training pertaining to the provision of care
id S0..1stringUnique id for inter-element referencing
extension N0..*ExtensionAdditional content defined by implementations
Slice: Unordered, Open by value:url
modifierExtension ?!ΣN0..*ExtensionExtensions that cannot be ignored even if unrecognized
identifier S0..*IdentifierNuméro de diplôme
code N1..1CodeableConceptCoded representation of the qualification
Binding: v2 table 0360, Version 2.7 (example): Specific qualification the practitioner has to provide a service.

id S0..1stringUnique id for inter-element referencing
extension N0..*ExtensionAdditional content defined by implementations
Slice: Unordered, Open by value:url

id 0..1stringUnique id for inter-element referencing
extension N0..*ExtensionAdditional content defined by implementations
Slice: Unordered, Open by value:url
reference SΣC0..1stringLiteral reference, Relative, internal or absolute URL
type SΣ0..1uriType the reference refers to (e.g. "Patient")
Binding: ResourceType (extensible): Aa resource (or, for logical models, the URI of the logical model).

identifier Σ0..1IdentifierCode du lieu d'obtention du diplôme
id 0..1stringUnique id for inter-element referencing
extension N0..*ExtensionAdditional content defined by implementations
Slice: Unordered, Open by value:url
use ?!SΣ0..1codeusual | official | temp | secondary | old (If known)
Binding: IdentifierUse (required): Identifies the purpose for this identifier, if known .

type SΣ0..1CodeableConceptDescription of identifier
Binding: Identifier Type Codes (extensible): A coded type for an identifier that can be used to determine which identifier to use for a specific purpose.

system Σ0..1uriThe namespace for the identifier value
Fixed Value: urn:oid:1.2.250.1.213.1.6.4.1
value ΣN0..1stringThe value that is unique
Example General: 123456
period SΣC0..1PeriodTime period when id is/was valid for use
assigner SΣC0..1Reference(Organization)Organization that issued id (may be just text)
display SΣ0..1stringText alternative for the resource
communication S0..*CodeableConceptTimedConcept - reference to a terminology or just text
Binding: CommonLanguages (preferred): A human language.

Additional BindingsPurpose
AllLanguagesMax Binding

Practitioner.qualification.issuer.typeextensibleResourceType
Practitioner.qualification.issuer.identifier.userequiredIdentifierUse
Practitioner.qualification.issuer.identifier.typeextensibleIdentifier Type Codes
Practitioner.communicationpreferredCommonLanguages
Additional Bindings Purpose
AllLanguages Max Binding

Constraints

IdGradePath(s)DetailsRequirements
att-1errorPractitioner.photoIf the Attachment has data, it SHALL have a contentType
: data.empty() or contentType.exists()
cpt-2errorPractitioner.telecomA system is required if a value is provided.
: value.empty() or system.exists()
ele-1error**ALL** elementsAll FHIR elements must have a @value or children
: hasValue() or (children().count() > id.count())
ext-1error**ALL** elementsMust have either extensions or value[x], not both
: extension.exists() != value.exists()
per-1errorPractitioner.identifier.period, Practitioner.name.period, Practitioner.telecom.period, Practitioner.qualification.period, Practitioner.qualification.issuer.identifier.periodIf present, start SHALL have a lower value than end
: start.hasValue().not() or end.hasValue().not() or (start <= end)
ref-1errorPractitioner.identifier.assigner, Practitioner.qualification.issuer, Practitioner.qualification.issuer.identifier.assignerSHALL have a contained resource if a local reference is provided
: reference.startsWith('#').not() or (reference.substring(1).trace('url') in %rootResource.contained.id.trace('ids'))
  <prev top   next>
